title: Empty Shulker Nesting
description: Allow you to put empty shulker boxes into another shulker boxes to make more space
body:
Empty Shulker Nesting is a lightweight quality-of-life mod that allows shulker boxes to be stored inside other shulker boxes — but only when they’re empty.

To prevent inventory abuse, recursion exploits, and accidental item loss, shulker boxes that contain items are completely blocked from being placed inside other shulkers.

**✨ Features**

- Store empty shulker boxes inside other shulkers

- Prevents nesting shulker boxes that contain items

- Stops infinite storage loops and duplication exploits

- Lightweight & performance-friendly

- Works exactly how you’d expect — no extra GUIs or configs required

**📦 Why use this?**

Managing shulker boxes can get messy fast. This mod lets you neatly store unused shulkers without breaking game balance or enabling infinite storage exploits.

**Perfect for:**

- Survival & SMP servers

- Technical players who want clean storage

- Modpacks that care about balance

**🔧 Compatibility**

- Works with vanilla shulker boxes

- Server-side friendly

- Safe to add to existing worlds
